user.title: Weather Forecast GIF Configuration
user.description: Configure the weather entities and server port.

data_description.forecast_entity: A weather.* entity that provides forecast data (e.g. weather.pirateweather). Must have daily forecast attributes.
data_description.station_entity: An optional weather.* entity for current conditions from a local weather station (e.g. weather.my_station). Leave empty to use the forecast entity for current conditions too.
data_description.port: Port number for the built-in web server that serves the generated GIFs.
data_description.radar_enabled: Enable or disable the animated radar map GIF served at /radar.gif.
data_description.radar_zoom: Map zoom level for the radar view (1 = wide, 7 = close). Default: 6.
data_description.radar_smooth: Apply smoothing to radar tiles for a cleaner look.
data_description.radar_snow: Display snow coverage on the radar overlay.
